description.taskContext: Review and update the client proposal document to reflect the new Q2 pricing structure, including revised hourly rates and package options.
description.additionalContext: The pricing changes were discussed in the last client call and need to be finalized before the next meeting.

description.taskContext: Conduct a thorough review of the existing brand guidelines document and identify areas that need updating for the new marketing push.
description.additionalContext: Client mentioned wanting a refresh of their brand identity during the intake call.

description.taskContext: Configure Google Analytics 4 property for the client's main website and set up basic event tracking for key user interactions.
description.additionalContext: The client is transitioning from Universal Analytics and needs GA4 set up before the deprecation deadline.

description.taskContext: Set up custom conversion events in Google Analytics 4 to track form submissions, button clicks, and purchase completions.
description.additionalContext: Follows the GA4 property setup. Conversion tracking is essential for the upcoming campaign performance measurement.

description.taskContext: Draft a comprehensive campaign brief for the Q1 marketing campaign, including target audience, messaging, channels, and KPIs.
description.additionalContext: This brief will guide all marketing activities for the next quarter.

description.taskContext: Build a monthly social media content calendar covering all active platforms (Instagram, LinkedIn, Twitter) with post topics, formats, and scheduling.
description.additionalContext: Aligns with the Q1 campaign brief and client's brand voice guidelines.

tasks.title: Draft email sequence for new leads

description.taskContext: Create a 5-email nurture sequence for new leads entering the funnel from the landing page, including welcome, value proposition, case study, offer, and follow-up emails.
description.additionalContext: Part of the broader lead generation strategy discussed with the client.

description.taskContext: Review and clean up the client's existing email list segments to ensure accurate targeting for the upcoming campaign.
description.additionalContext: Several segments have not been updated since Q3 of last year.

description.taskContext: Design and publish the landing page for the Q2 marketing campaign, including lead capture form and tracking pixels.
description.additionalContext: Depends on finalized campaign messaging from the campaign brief.

description.taskContext: Set up the integration between the client's CRM system and email marketing platform to enable automated lead syncing and segmentation.
description.additionalContext: This integration is a prerequisite for the automated email sequences.
